title: alsophila lisyae
intro: Alsophila lisyae, also known as the Lysia tree fern, is a species of plant in the Alsophila genus, which is a type of tree fern native to the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alsophila lisyae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to create a medicinal tea or decoction.
